name: Bebu Golf Studios
about:
Bebu Golf Studios is a specialized indoor golf facility founded by Master Fitter Buddha Nguyen, focusing primarily on custom club fitting and building since 2003. The studio features TrackMan launch monitor technology and a Club Conex Interchangeable Shaft Fitting System with over 20,000 possible club combinations. The venue positions itself as a premium service provider catering to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned professionals.

The facility offers comprehensive services including driver, iron, wedge, and putter fittings, as well as personalized coaching lessons and club repair services. All clubs are built in-house to match exact fitting specifications with tight industry tolerances. The studio is located in the New Orleans area and operates primarily by appointment.

Pricing follows a tiered hourly structure ranging from $100 for one-hour sessions to $300 for three-hour comprehensive fittings. The venue emphasizes premium brands, SST puring services, and a master-level fitting experience rather than entertainment-focused simulator play.
why_golfers_like_it: Master fitter with extensive experience fitting all skill levels and swing types
TrackMan technology paired with 20,000+ club combination options for precise fitting
In-house club building with tightest tolerances in the industry
SST puring services available for irons, wedges, and drivers
Premium brands and personalized coaching for all levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Described as the most advanced ball flight monitor available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your current clubs for fitting comparison, but the studio has over 20,000 possible club combinations with their Club Conex Interchangeable Shaft Fitting System for testing various setups.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or beverage policies. Contact the studio directly for information about bringing refreshments.

faq.question: How long does a fitting session take?
faq.answer: Sessions range from 1 hour ($100) to 3 hours ($300) depending on the scope. A full bag fitting typically takes several hours to ensure proper analysis and club selection.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The studio welcomes golfers of all levels from beginners to pros, but does not specifically mention children's programs or age restrictions.
